AiEvaluationDefinition.name: Regression
AiEvaluationDefinition.description: Full per-action regression suite for MyOrgButler

inputs.utterance: the Acme Q1 Expansion Deal has a PDF file attached, open it and tell me the total contract value

expectation.name: actions_assertion
expectation.expectedValue: ['AnswerWithCurrentFile']

expectation.name: bot_response_rating
expectation.expectedValue: States the total contract value is 500,000

inputs.utterance: is there an approval process configured for Opportunities? use the Metadata API to check

expectation.name: actions_assertion
expectation.expectedValue: ['CallMetadataApi']

expectation.name: bot_response_rating
expectation.expectedValue: Shows approval process details for Opportunity or states that no approval process is configured

inputs.utterance: use the REST API to create a new Task with Subject "Call Burlington" and Status "Not Started"

expectation.name: actions_assertion
expectation.expectedValue: ['CallRestApi']

expectation.name: bot_response_rating
expectation.expectedValue: Confirms a Task record was created with subject containing Call Burlington

inputs.utterance: what is the Apex code coverage percentage in this org?

expectation.name: actions_assertion
expectation.expectedValue: ['CallToolingApi']

expectation.name: bot_response_rating
expectation.expectedValue: Returns a specific code coverage percentage or lists coverage per class with percentages

inputs.utterance: create a PlantUML ER diagram showing how Account, Opportunity and Contact are related

expectation.name: actions_assertion
expectation.expectedValue: ['CreatePlantUmlUrl']

expectation.name: bot_response_rating
expectation.expectedValue: Returns a clickable PlantUML URL containing a diagram that shows Account, Opportunity and Contact with their relationships

inputs.utterance: what fields does the Memory__c object have and what are their types?

expectation.name: actions_assertion
expectation.expectedValue: ['ExploreOrgSchema']

expectation.name: bot_response_rating
expectation.expectedValue: Lists fields of Memory__c including Content__c and IsShared__c

expectation.name: actions_assertion
expectation.expectedValue: ['LoadCustomInstructions']

expectation.name: bot_response_rating
expectation.expectedValue: Shows stored user preferences or states that no custom preferences have been saved yet

inputs.utterance: send me a hello world notification

expectation.name: actions_assertion
expectation.expectedValue: ['NotifyUser']

expectation.name: bot_response_rating
expectation.expectedValue: Confirms a notification containing the words hello world was sent

inputs.utterance: every weekday at 9am, check for opportunities closing this week and notify me

expectation.name: actions_assertion
expectation.expectedValue: ['PlanForLater']

expectation.name: bot_response_rating
expectation.expectedValue: Confirms the plan was scheduled successfully and provides a link to the plan record

inputs.utterance: how many documents has our agent been given to search through?

expectation.name: actions_assertion
expectation.expectedValue: ['ExploreDataCloud', 'QueryDataCloud']

expectation.name: bot_response_rating
expectation.expectedValue: States a count of documents the agent can search (a number, 2 or more)

inputs.utterance: which deal should I focus on this week?

expectation.name: actions_assertion
expectation.expectedValue: ['QueryRecordsWithSoql']

expectation.name: bot_response_rating
expectation.expectedValue: Recommends the Acme Q1 Expansion Deal as the opportunity to focus on

inputs.utterance: what is our company discount policy for deals over $100K? check the company docs

expectation.name: actions_assertion
expectation.expectedValue: ['ExploreDataCloud', 'SearchDataLibrary']

expectation.name: bot_response_rating
expectation.expectedValue: Mentions that discounts above 10 percent require VP of Sales approval

inputs.utterance: where is Aquiva Labs located and when were they founded? search the web

expectation.name: actions_assertion
expectation.expectedValue: ['SearchWeb']

expectation.name: bot_response_rating
expectation.expectedValue: Mentions Florida (Celebration or Orlando) as location and 2015 as founding year

inputs.utterance: from now on, always show the StageName when listing opportunities

expectation.name: actions_assertion
expectation.expectedValue: ['StoreCustomInstruction']

expectation.name: bot_response_rating
expectation.expectedValue: Confirms it stored a preference to always include StageName when listing opportunities
